from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

def build_template(ws):
    ws.title = "製造指図書"

    # Column widths (A=1 through O=15)
    col_widths = {
        1: 2,    # spacer
        2: 8,    # 手配No label
        3: 12,   # 手配No value
        4: 4,    # sub
        5: 8,    # 発行日 label
        6: 12,   # 発行日 value
        7: 2,    # spacer
        8: 8,    # 作成者 / 手配納期 label
        9: 12,   # value
        10: 2,   # spacer
        11: 8,   # 成分名 part1
        12: 8,   # 成分名 part2
        13: 8,   # 原単位
        14: 8,   # 分量
        15: 8,   # 秤量者
        16: 12,  # 原料ロット
        17: 8,   # 確認者
        18: 2,   # spacer
    }
    # Redefine columns more carefully
    # Let's use 18 columns
    num_cols = 18
    num_rows = 55

    col_widths_final = {
        1: 2,
        2: 10,
        3: 14,
        4: 4,
        5: 10,
        6: 14,
        7: 10,
        8: 10,
        9: 2,
        10: 2,
        11: 18,
        12: 8,
        13: 8,
        14: 8,
        15: 14,
        16: 10,
        17: 2,
    }
    num_cols = 17

    for col, width in col_widths_final.items():
        ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col)].width = width

    # Row heights
    row_heights = {
        1: 30,  # title row
        2: 20,
        3: 20,
        4: 20,
        5: 20,
        6: 20,
        7: 20,
        8: 20,
        9: 30,  # 調合票 header
        10: 20, # 責任者
        11: 25, # column headers
    }
    for r in range(1, num_rows + 1):
        ws.row_dimensions[r].height = row_heights.get(r, 18)

    # 2. Apply thin border to every cell
    thin = Side(style='thin')
    border = Border(top=thin, bottom=thin, left=thin, right=thin)
    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=num_rows, min_col=1, max_col=num_cols):
        for cell in row:
            cell.border = border

    # 3. Set values, fonts, alignments, fills
    center = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
    left = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
    right = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')
    bold = Font(bold=True)
    bold_large = Font(bold=True, size=14)

    # Header shading (light gray for label cells)
    gray_fill = PatternFill(start_color="CCCCCC", end_color="CCCCCC", fill_type="solid")
    light_gray = PatternFill(start_color="E0E0E0", end_color="E0E0E0", fill_type="solid")

    # Row 1: 製造指図書 title (centered across form)
    ws['B1'].value = "製造指図書"
    ws['B1'].font = bold_large
    ws['B1'].alignment = center

    # Row 2: 手配No.
    ws['B2'].value = "手配No."
    ws['B2'].font = bold
    ws['B2'].alignment = center
    ws['B2'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['E2'].value = "発行日"
    ws['E2'].font = bold
    ws['E2'].alignment = center
    ws['E2'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['H2'].value = "作成者"
    ws['H2'].font = bold
    ws['H2'].alignment = center
    ws['H2'].fill = gray_fill

    # Row 3: 手配先
    ws['B3'].value = "手配先"
    ws['B3'].font = bold
    ws['B3'].alignment = center
    ws['B3'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['H3'].value = "手配納期"
    ws['H3'].font = bold
    ws['H3'].alignment = center
    ws['H3'].fill = gray_fill

    # Row 4: 品目CD
    ws['B4'].value = "品目CD"
    ws['B4'].font = bold
    ws['B4'].alignment = center
    ws['B4'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['E4'].value = "工順"
    ws['E4'].font = bold
    ws['E4'].alignment = center
    ws['E4'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['H4'].value = "発注手配数"
    ws['H4'].font = bold
    ws['H4'].alignment = center
    ws['H4'].fill = gray_fill

    # Row 5: 品目名
    ws['B5'].value = "品目名"
    ws['B5'].font = bold
    ws['B5'].alignment = center
    ws['B5'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['H5'].value = "製番"
    ws['H5'].font = bold
    ws['H5'].alignment = center
    ws['H5'].fill = gray_fill

    # Row 6: 手配内容
    ws['B6'].value = "手配内容"
    ws['B6'].font = bold
    ws['B6'].alignment = center
    ws['B6'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['H6'].value = "完成入庫"
    ws['H6'].font = bold
    ws['H6'].alignment = center
    ws['H6'].fill = gray_fill

    # Row 7: ロットNo.
    ws['B7'].value = "ロットNo."
    ws['B7'].font = bold
    ws['B7'].alignment = center
    ws['B7'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['H7'].value = "完成日"
    ws['H7'].font = bold
    ws['H7'].alignment = center
    ws['H7'].fill = gray_fill

    # Row 8: blank separator / 調合票 title row
    ws['B8'].value = "調合票"
    ws['B8'].font = bold_large
    ws['B8'].alignment = center

    # Row 9: 責任者
    ws['H9'].value = "責任者"
    ws['H9'].font = bold
    ws['H9'].alignment = center
    ws['H9'].fill = gray_fill

    # Row 10: column headers for 調合票
    ws['B10'].value = "成分名"
    ws['B10'].font = bold
    ws['B10'].alignment = center
    ws['B10'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['E10'].value = "原単位"
    ws['E10'].font = bold
    ws['E10'].alignment = center
    ws['E10'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['F10'].value = "分量"
    ws['F10'].font = bold
    ws['F10'].alignment = center
    ws['F10'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['G10'].value = "秤量者"
    ws['G10'].font = bold
    ws['G10'].alignment = center
    ws['G10'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['H10'].value = "原料ロット"
    ws['H10'].font = bold
    ws['H10'].alignment = center
    ws['H10'].fill = gray_fill

    ws['I10'].value = "確認者"
    ws['I10'].font = bold
    ws['I10'].alignment = center
    ws['I10'].fill = gray_fill

    # Last row: 備考
    ws[f'B{num_rows}'].value = "備考"
    ws[f'B{num_rows}'].font = bold
    ws[f'B{num_rows}'].alignment = center
    ws[f'B{num_rows}'].fill = gray_fill

    # 4. Merge cells
    # Title row
    ws.merge_cells('B1:G1')
    # Barcode area
    ws.merge_cells('H1:P1')

    # Row 2: 手配No value spans cols C-D, 発行日 value spans F-G
    ws.merge_cells('C2:D2')  # 手配No value
    ws.merge_cells('F2:G2')  # 発行日 value
    ws.merge_cells('H2:P2')  # 作成者 box (tall, merge rows 2-3)

    # Row 3
    ws.merge_cells('C3:G3')  # 手配先 value
    # 手配納期 value
    ws.merge_cells('I3:P3')

    # Row 4
    ws.merge_cells('C4:D4')  # 品目CD value
    ws.merge_cells('F4:G4')  # 工順 value
    ws.merge_cells('I4:P4')  # 発注手配数 value

    # Row 5
    ws.merge_cells('C5:G5')  # 品目名 value
    ws.merge_cells('I5:P5')  # 製番 value

    # Row 6
    ws.merge_cells('C6:G6')  # 手配内容 value
    ws.merge_cells('I6:P6')  # 完成入庫 value

    # Row 7
    ws.merge_cells('C7:G7')  # ロットNo value
    ws.merge_cells('I7:P7')  # 完成日 value

    # 調合票 title
    ws.merge_cells('B8:P8')

    # 責任者
    ws.merge_cells('H9:P9')

    # Column headers
    ws.merge_cells('B10:D10')  # 成分名
    ws.merge_cells('I10:P10')  # 確認者 (or keep separate)

    # Data rows (11 to num_rows-2): merge 成分名 cols B-D
    for r in range(11, num_rows - 1):
        ws.merge_cells(f'B{r}:D{r}')

    # 備考 row
    ws.merge_cells(f'B{num_rows}:P{num_rows}')

    # Page setup
    ws.page_setup.paperSize = 9
    ws.page_setup.fitToPage = True
    ws.page_setup.fitToWidth = 1
    ws.page_setup.fitToHeight = 1
    ws.page_setup.orientation = "portrait"
    ws.page_margins.left = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.right = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.top = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.bottom = 0.5

if __name__ == "__main__":
    from openpyxl import Workbook
    wb = Workbook()
    ws = wb.active
    build_template(ws)
    wb.save("製造指図書_template.xlsx")
